rulings.Case Title: OFELIA MUNGUIA ET AL VS. ARTURO RODRIGUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order To Disqualify Defendant Francisco Aldana From Representing Defendant Arturo Rodriguez, Jerry Velasco And Any Other Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Feb. 06, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFFs OFELIA MUNGUIA, JESUS MUNGUIA SANCHEZ, and CARLOS AUSEJO's Motion For Order To Disqualify Defendant Francisco Aldana From Representing Defendant Arturo Rodriguez, Jerry Velasco And Any Other Defendant is CONTINUED to February 27, 2020. The parties are ordered to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) by providing this Court with courtesy copies of the Opposition and Reply by February 13, 2020 with an updated cover page reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/CFH)
